name: io.github.superbigroach/obol
title: Obol
description: Monetize and pay for APIs from AI agents. Obol is the marketplace where agents discover services and pay per call in USDC — gasless, sub-cent (from $0.000001), 0% commission, via x402 + Circle Gateway on Arc. List your API to earn, or let your agent find and pay for services automatically.

environmentVariables.name: OBOL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Obol API key (obl_sk_live_...) from obol-arc.web.app/settings — identifies your account for listing services and metered calls.

environmentVariables.name: OBOL_AGENT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 32-byte hex Arc wallet private key that signs gasless x402/EIP-3009 payment authorizations. Needed only for paying (pay_and_call); discovery and listing work without it.
